name: NOVONIX Limited
description: NOVONIX Limited is a battery technology and materials company dedicated to powering a sustainable future. The company focuses on building a resilient North American synthetic graphite supply chain to support the next generation of lithium-ion batteries. By reducing supply chain risk and advancing energy independence, NOVONIX develops scalable platforms for critical battery-grade materials. With operations centered in Chattanooga, Tennessee, the company provides essential products and services to the global battery ecosystem, aiming to enhance the efficiency and performance of energy storage solutions while supporting the transition to cleaner energy technologies.
